infoPlist.NSSpeechRecognitionUsageDescription: Allow Vox to use speech recognition for voice commands.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Allow Vox to use your microphone for voice commands.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Allow Vox to use your location for weather and local information.
infoPlist.NSCalendarsFullAccessUsageDescription: Allow Vox to create calendar events for you.
infoPlist.NSCalendarsUsageDescription: Allow Vox to create calendar events for you.

plugins.microphonePermission: Allow Vox to use your microphone for voice commands.

plugins.photosPermission: Allow Vox to show your photos when you ask for them.

plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: Allow Vox to use your location for weather and local information.

plugins.calendarPermission: Allow Vox to create calendar events for you.
